case_title: BARRON, GRACE P. et al VS UNITED AIRLINES

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BARRON, GRACE P. BLAINE, CHERYL D. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT UNITED AIRLINES $2,769.30 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,849.30 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF FEB-10-1999, GRANTED
NOTICE OF CONTINUANCE TO UNITED AIRLINES RETURNED ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN;
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-07-1998, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAR-17-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED AIRLINES DISMISS W/ PREJUDICE-NON APPEARANCE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,750.00 FILED BY BARRON, GRACE P. BLAINE, CHERYL D. AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED AIRLINES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-07-1998 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT UNITED AIRLINES HEARING SET FOR FEB-10-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED AIRLINES
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGEMENT TO UNITED AIRLINES RE TURNED-ATTEMPTED, NOT KNOWN.
